text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated that Iran has a historic chance to make a deal: "Iran has a historic chance to make a serious deal and the ball is in their court. Either way, the war department stands ready for what comes next locked…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated that the Blockade is expanding and going global: "On this core mission, America's will is unshakable, our capabilities unmatched. Our blockade is only growing. And going global. And as the president said, we have all the time in the world." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）表示，伊朗有一个达成协议的历史性机会：‘伊朗有一个达成严肃协议的历史性机会，球在他们那边。无论如何，战争部已为接下来发生的一切做好了准备，蓄势待发……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，封锁正在扩大并走向全球：“在这一核心任务上，美国的意志不可动摇，我们的能力无与伦比。我们的封锁只会不断扩大。并走向全球。正如总统所说，我们有的是时间。” @wfwitness

text: Hegseth: Iran’s military has been reduced to a gang of pirates.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：伊朗军队已被削减为一群海盗。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth stated that U.S. President Donald Trump has authorised strikes on small vessals: "President Trump has authorized the United States Navy to destroy any Iranian fastboats that attempt to put mines in the water, or disrupt…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated that Iran has a historic chance to make a deal: "Iran has a historic chance to make a serious deal and the ball is in their court. Either way, the war department stands ready for what comes next locked and loaded." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普已授权对小型船只进行打击：‘特朗普总统已授权美国海军摧毁任何试图在水中布雷或干扰……的伊朗快艇’。” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，伊朗有一个达成协议的历史性机会：“伊朗有一个达成严肃协议的历史性机会，球在他们那边。无论如何，战争部已为接下来发生的一切做好了准备，蓄势待发。” @wfwitness

text: Hegseth: A second aircraft carrier will join the blockade in just a few days. The blockade has gone global.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：第二艘航空母舰将在几天内加入封锁行动。封锁已走向全球。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon: "Iran will never get a nuclear bomb." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth stated that U.S. President Donald Trump has authorised strikes on small vessals: "President Trump has authorized the United States Navy to destroy any Iranian fastboats that attempt to put mines in the water, or disrupt passage through the Strait Of Hormuz to shoot and kill." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器：‘伊朗永远不会得到核弹。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普已授权对小型船只进行打击：“特朗普总统已授权美国海军摧毁任何试图在水中布雷，或干扰通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只，并进行射击和杀伤。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth stated that the blockade will be in place for as long as it is needed: "A blockade as long as it takes." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon: "Iran will never get a nuclear bomb." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，封锁将持续到需要为止：‘封锁将持续到必要之时。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，伊朗永远不会拥有核武器：“伊朗永远不会得到核弹。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth stated that the blockade will be in place for as long as it is needed: "A blockade as long as it takes." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，封锁将持续到需要为止：“封锁将持续到必要之时。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel US Secretary of War Hegseth: A second US aircraft carrier will join the blockade tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国战争部长赫格塞斯：第二艘美国航空母舰将加入封锁 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and Joint Chiefs Chairman Gen. Dan Caine are holding a press briefing on Iran. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯和参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩（Dan Caine）将军正在就伊朗问题举行新闻发布会。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hegseth: "Iran has a chance to make a good deal." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 赫格塞斯：“伊朗有机会达成一项好的协议。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Russian Shahed/Geran-type long-range strike drone splashes into a lake in Kyiv during a Russian attack on the Ukrainian capital on Friday's morning. Flying directly over the head of a cameraman. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2047647687059587383/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）周五上午，在俄罗斯对乌克兰首都的袭击中，一枚俄罗斯沙赫德/天竺葵（Shahed/Geran）型远程打击无人机坠入基辅的一个湖中。直接从摄影师头顶飞过。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2047647687059587383/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor A group of hardline House Democrats are urging colleagues to start laying the groundwork against Trump now, aiming for a Day 1 impeachment push if they regain control of the House. (Axios) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047646748785717489/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一群强硬派众议院民主党人正在敦促同事们现在就开始为反对特朗普做准备，目标是如果他们重新获得众议院控制权，就推动第一天的弹劾。 (Axios) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047646748785717489/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Iranian foreign minister will arrive in Pakistan tonight #New Iran's Foreign Minister is set to visit Islamabad today, according to government source in Pakistan - Michael A. Horowitz tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz） 伊朗外交部长今晚将抵达巴基斯坦 #New 据巴基斯坦政府消息人士称，伊朗外交部长定于今天访问伊斯兰堡 - 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The Ukrainian middle-range strike campaign against Russian forces continues with astonishing tempo. Utilizing FP-2 OWA-UAVs, Ukraine's Special Operations Forces conduct attacks on Russian military assets in Russia-occupied parts of Ukraine. Among the targets seen in the footage: 🎯 Logistics base in Smile, Zaporizhzhia Oblast (47.544378, 36.682308); 🎯 Ammunition depot in Trudove, Zaporizhzhia Oblast (47.328661, 36.577567); 🎯 Equipment base in Manhush, Donetsk Oblast (47.060081, 37.327294); 🎯 Repair base in Klynkyne, Donetsk Oblast (47.287786, 38.252639); 🎯 Fuel storage base in Novoamvrosiivske, Donetsk Oblast; 🎯 Logistics and repair base in Berdyansk, Zaporizhzhia Oblast (46.800164, 36.740756). tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）乌克兰针对俄罗斯军队的中程打击行动正以惊人的速度持续进行。乌克兰特种作战部队利用FP-2 OWA-UAV无人机，对俄罗斯占领的乌克兰境内的俄罗斯军事资产进行了攻击。视频中可见的目标包括：🎯 扎波罗热州Smile的后勤基地 (47.544378, 36.682308)；🎯 扎波罗热州Trudove的弹药库 (47.328661, 36.577567)；🎯 顿涅茨克州Manhush的装备基地 (47.060081, 37.327294)；🎯 顿涅茨克州Klynkyne的维修基地 (47.287786, 38.252639)；🎯 顿涅茨克州Novoamvrosiivske的燃料储存基地；🎯 扎波罗热州别尔江斯克的后勤和维修基地 (46.800164, 36.740756)。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's state TV released a list of energy facilities it says will be targeted when the war resumes: • RasGas and Ras Laffan LNG facilities in Qatar • Das and Zirku Islands in the UAE (major offshore oil and gas hubs) • Abqaiq, Safaniya, and Khurais facilities in Saudi Arabia • Burgan oil field in Kuwait tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗国家电视台发布了一份名单，称战争恢复时将成为目标的能源设施：• 卡塔尔的RasGas和Ras Laffan液化天然气设施 • 阿联酋的Das和Zirku岛（主要的离岸石油和天然气枢纽） • 沙特阿拉伯的Abqaiq、Safaniya和Khurais设施 • 科威特的Burgan油田 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM confirms that, for the first time since 2003, 3 U.S. Navy carrier strike groups are operating simultaneously in the Middle East. Meanwhile, reports of Iran sending a delegation to Pakistan. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047644224456147386/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 中央司令部证实，自2003年以来，首次有3个美国海军航母打击群同时在中东地区行动。与此同时，有报道称伊朗正在派遣代表团前往巴基斯坦。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047644224456147386/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel An Israeli Hermes 450 drone was allegedly shot down over southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047643596514308393/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据称一架以色列赫尔墨斯450（Hermes 450）无人机在黎巴嫩南部被击落。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047643596514308393/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reuters report via Pakistan source: Iran’s foreign minister is expected to arrive in Islamabad on Friday night with a small delegation, and peace talks with the U.S. are likely to follow, a government source said. The source added that a U.S. logistics and security team is already in Islamabad ahead of the talks. We’ve seen this before, so take with a grain of salt, talks are not confirmed. Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi expected in Islamabad on Friday night. - Pakistan government source https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047640896120795571/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 路透社通过巴基斯坦消息来源报道：据一位政府消息人士称，伊朗外交部长预计将于周五晚间率领一个小代表团抵达伊斯兰堡，随后可能会与美国进行和平谈判。该消息人士补充说，一个美国后勤和安全小组已经在伊斯兰堡为谈判做准备。我们以前见过这种情况，所以请持保留态度，谈判尚未得到证实。伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）预计将于周五晚间抵达伊斯兰堡。 - 巴基斯坦政府消息来源 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047640896120795571/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: OSINTtechnical CENTCOM confirms that, for the first time since 2003, three US Navy carrier strike groups are operating in the Middle East simultaneously. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 中央司令部证实，自2003年以来，首次有三个美国海军航母打击群同时在中东地区行动。 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @JayinKyiv : Zelensky's second visit to Saudi Arabia in 3 weeks. I have arrived in Saudi Arabia, where I will meet with Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman Al Saud. Yesterday, at a meeting with European leaders, we secured financial guarantees for our resilience. Today, we are advancing our agreements with Saudi Arabia in the areas of security, energy, and infrastructure. It is important that the strengthening is mutual. I appreciate the substantive cooperation between our countries. - Volodymyr Zelenskyy / Володимир Зеленський tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz） 转发 @JayinKyiv：泽连斯基3周内第二次访问沙特阿拉伯。我已经抵达沙特阿拉伯，在那里我将与穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼·阿勒沙特王储会面。昨天，在与欧洲领导人的会议上，我们获得了我们韧性的财务保证。今天，我们正在推进与沙特阿拉伯在安全、能源和基础设施领域的协议。加强这种互惠关系非常重要。我感谢我们两国之间实质性的合作。 - 弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基（Volodymyr Zelenskyy） 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 JUST IN! Iran's delegation led by Foreign Minister Araghchi is allegedly arriving in Pakistan today for another round of talks with the US, according to Reuters citing a source. The American logistics and security team is already in Islamabad. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 最新消息！据路透社援引消息人士的话称，由外交部长阿拉格希率领的伊朗代表团据称今天抵达巴基斯坦，与美国进行新一轮谈判。美国的后勤和安全小组已经在伊斯兰堡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Sky News: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to travel to Islamabad tonight for a second round of peace talks with the United States, a Pakistani government source told Sky News. A small team will accompany him, and a U.S. logistics…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Al Jazeera : A Pakistani government sources have confirmed a “high likelihood of a breakthrough” in US‑Iran talks in Islamabad, as a delegation led by Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to arrive tonight. Araghchi spoke earlier with Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar, and separately with Army Chief Asim Munir – though the military has not confirmed the latter. Nine US planes arrived earlier this week in Islamabad carrying communications equipment, security staff and technical personnel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 天空新闻（Sky News）：一位巴基斯坦政府消息人士告诉天空新闻，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希预计将于今晚前往伊斯兰堡，与美国进行第二轮和平谈判。一个小团队将陪同他，而一个美国后勤……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 半岛电视台：巴基斯坦政府消息人士证实，随着由伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希率领的代表团预计于今晚抵达，美伊在伊斯兰堡的谈判“很有可能取得突破”。阿拉格希早些时候与巴基斯坦副总理兼外交部长伊沙克·达尔（Ishaq Dar）进行了交谈，并分别与陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）进行了交谈——尽管军方尚未证实后者。九架美国飞机本周早些时候抵达伊斯兰堡，运载了通信设备、安全人员和技术人员。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Footage showing the wreckage of the intercepted Hermes. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced that it shot down an Israeli Hermes 450 drone in the skies of the Tyre‑Al‑Hawsh area using a surface‑to‑air missile, in response to Israeli violations of the ceasefire and its “breach of Lebanese airspace”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 画面显示被拦截的赫尔墨斯无人机残骸。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，为回应以色列违反停火协议及“侵犯黎巴嫩领空”的行为，其使用地对空导弹在提尔-阿尔豪什（Tyre‑Al‑Hawsh）地区上空击落了一架以色列赫尔墨斯450无人机。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 i24NEWS: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to arrive in Islamabad today. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Sky News : Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to travel to Islamabad tonight for a second round of peace talks with the United States, a Pakistani government source told Sky News. A small team will accompany him, and a U.S. logistics and security team is already in Islamabad. The development follows important discussions with the pakistani mediation team after direct talks collapsed earlier this week. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 i24NEWS：伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐预计将于今日抵达伊斯兰堡。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 天空新闻台：据巴基斯坦政府消息人士向天空新闻台透露，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐预计将于今晚前往伊斯兰堡，与美国进行第二轮和平谈判。一个小团队将陪同他前往，而一个美国后勤和安全小组已经抵达伊斯兰堡。此前，在与巴基斯坦调解小组进行重要讨论后，双方于本周早些时候的直接会谈破裂，此次进展紧随其后。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "Interception attempt" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF reports that one drone was intercepted before crossing into Israeli territory. Another suspicious aerial target was identified near Israeli forces in Lebanon and contact with it was lost. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“拦截尝试” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军报告称，一架无人机在进入以色列领土前被拦截。另一个可疑空中目标在黎巴嫩境内的以色列军队附近被发现，随后与其失去了联系。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Mehr News Agency: A US‑sanctioned supertanker, the Cuba, sailing under the Curaçao flag, has crossed the Strait of Hormuz and anchored east of Larak Island. The vessel was blacklisted in 2024 for transporting Iranian oil to China. Mehr said the transit shows that Washington’s claimed blockade has been breached, as Iranian‑linked ships continue to move through the waterway. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 梅尔通讯社：一艘悬挂库拉索国旗、受美国制裁的超级油轮“古巴号”已穿过霍尔木兹海峡，并在拉拉克岛以东抛锚。该船因向中国运输伊朗石油于2024年被列入黑名单。梅尔通讯社称，此次航行表明华盛顿声称的封锁已被突破，与伊朗有关的船只继续在该水道通行。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 Alleged Israeli Hermes 450 drone shot down over southern Lebanon. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost" 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Israeli army radio reported from an Israeli source: Hezbollah succeeded in shooting down a drone belonging to the air force in the skies of Tyre. The drone was shot down using a surface-to-air missile. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇱🇧⚡️🇮🇱 据称一架以色列赫尔墨斯 450 无人机在黎巴嫩南部被击落。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost” 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列陆军电台援引以色列消息人士的话报道：真主党成功在提尔上空击落了一架属于空军的无人机。该无人机是被地对空导弹击落的。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Alleged Israeli Hermes 450 drone shot down over southern Lebanon. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 据称一架以色列赫尔墨斯 450 无人机在黎巴嫩南部被击落。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 🇺🇸 CENTCOM: For the first time in decades, three aircraft carriers are operating in the Middle East at the same time. Accompanied by their carrier air wings, the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72), USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) and USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) include over 200 aircraft and 15,000 Sailors and Marines. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 美国中央司令部：几十年来，三艘航空母舰首次同时在中东地区行动。在航母舰载机联队的护卫下，亚伯拉罕·林肯号（CVN 72）、杰拉尔德·R·福特号（CVN 78）和乔治·H·W·布什号（CVN 77）航母打击群包括 200 多架飞机以及 15,000 名水兵和海军陆战队员。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Lebanese MP Najat Saliba welcomed the three‑week extension of the Israel‑Lebanon ceasefire, telling the BBC that people will now have a chance to return home and “get going with their lives”. She said the Lebanese government is “very firm” about continuing…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah MP Ali Fayyad said the three‑week extension of the Lebanon ceasefire is “meaningless” because of continued Israeli attacks in the south. Fayyad criticised the agreement for obliging Lebanon to adhere to the truce while imposing “no obligations, not even minimal ones” on Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩议员纳贾特·萨利巴（Najat Saliba）对以黎停火协议延长三周表示欢迎，她告诉英国广播公司（BBC），人们现在有机会回家并‘继续他们的生活’。她说，黎巴嫩政府对于继续……的态度‘非常坚定’” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员阿里·法耶德（Ali Fayyad）表示，黎巴嫩停火协议延长三周是“毫无意义的”，因为以色列在南部持续发动袭击。法耶德批评该协议强迫黎巴嫩遵守休战，却对以色列“没有任何义务，甚至连最低限度的义务都没有”。@wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The Ukrainian middle-range strike campaign against Russian forces continues with astonishing tempo. Utilizing FP-2 OWA-UAV, Ukraine's Special Operations Forces conduct attacks on Russian military assets in Russia-occupied parts of Ukraine. Among the targets seen in the footage: 🎯 Logistics base in Smile, Zaporizhzhia Oblast (47.544378, 36.682308); 🎯 Ammunition depot in Trudove, Zaporizhzhia Oblast (47.328661, 36.577567); 🎯 Equipment base in Manhush, Donetsk Oblast (47.060081, 37.327294); 🎯 Repair base in Klynkyne, Donetsk Oblast (47.287786, 38.252639); 🎯 Fuel storage base in Novoamvrosiivske, Donetsk Oblast; 🎯 Logistics and repair base in Berdyansk, Zaporizhzhia Oblast (46.800164, 36.740756). tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）乌克兰针对俄军的中程打击行动正以惊人的速度持续进行。乌克兰特种作战部队利用 FP-2 OWA-UAV 对俄罗斯占领的乌克兰境内的俄军军事资产进行攻击。视频中可见的目标包括：🎯 扎波罗热州 Smile 的后勤基地（47.544378, 36.682308）；🎯 扎波罗热州 Trudove 的弹药库（47.328661, 36.577567）；🎯 顿涅茨克州 Manhush 的装备基地（47.060081, 37.327294）；🎯 顿涅茨克州 Klynkyne 的维修基地（47.287786, 38.252639）；🎯 顿涅茨克州 Novoamvrosiivske 的燃料储存基地；🎯 扎波罗热州别尔江斯克的后勤和维修基地（46.800164, 36.740756）。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Call between Iran and Pakistan DPM/FM Senator Mohammad Ishaq Dar @MIshaqDar50 received a call today from Foreign Minister of Iran H.E. Abbas Araghchi @Araghchi. Both sides exchanged views on regional developments, the ceasefire, and ongoing diplomatic efforts being pursued by Islamabad in the context of US-Iran engagement. DPM/FM underscored the importance of sustained dialogue and engagement to address outstanding issues, in order to advance regional peace and stability at the earliest. FM Araghchi appreciated Pakistan’s consistent and constructive facilitation role in this regard, and both leaders agreed to remain in close contact. - Ministry of Foreign Affairs - Pakistan tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 伊朗与巴基斯坦通话：副总理兼外交部长穆罕默德·伊沙克·达尔（Mohammad Ishaq Dar）参议员 @MIshaqDar50 今天接到了伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）阁下 @Araghchi 的电话。双方就地区局势、停火以及伊斯兰堡在美伊接触背景下正在进行的各种外交努力交换了意见。副总理兼外长强调了持续对话与接触以解决遗留问题的重要性，旨在尽早促进地区和平与稳定。阿拉格齐外长对巴基斯坦在此方面一贯且具有建设性的促进作用表示赞赏，双方领导人同意保持密切联系。- 巴基斯坦外交部 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 China has once again urged its citizens to leave Iran immediately, warning that security risks remain despite a fragile ceasefire. The embassy advised against all travel to Iran, citing unpredictable conditions. Those already in Iran were told to avoid sensitive areas and move to safer locations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 中国再次敦促其公民立即离开伊朗，警告称尽管停火协议脆弱，但安全风险依然存在。大使馆建议不要前往伊朗，理由是局势不可预测。已在伊朗的中国公民被告知要避开敏感地区并转移到更安全的地方。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇸🇦 Ukrianian President Zelenskyy has arrived in Saudi Arabia to meet Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. Following the EU’s approval of a €90 billion loan for Ukraine, Zelenskyy said he would advance bilateral agreements with Saudi Arabia in the areas of security, energy and infrastructure. “It is important that the strengthening is mutual,” he wrote. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇸🇦 乌克兰总统泽连斯基已抵达沙特阿拉伯，会见王储穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼。在欧盟批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款后，泽连斯基表示，他将推进与沙特在安全、能源和基础设施领域的双边协议。他写道：“加强互利合作非常重要。” @wfwitness
